meta.title: Raisa Kouekam — Full Stack Software Engineer
meta.description: Full Stack Software Engineer building scalable web applications, e-commerce marketplaces, fintech platforms and digital products for international teams.

home.name: Raisa Kouekam
home.subtitle: I build scalable web applications, e-commerce platforms and digital products that solve real business problems.
home.featuredSubtitle: Recent products spanning marketplaces, fintech and developer tooling — built for scale and real-world impact.
home.aboutText: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer with a focus on clean architecture, performance and user experience. I partner with international teams to ship products that are reliable, maintainable and ready for production.
home.skillsSubtitle: A balanced skill set across frontend, backend, cloud and tooling.
home.experienceSubtitle: Building software across startups and international remote teams.
home.contactSubtitle: Open to full-time roles and contract opportunities across Canada, France, Germany, the UK and the US.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineer, builder, and problem solver focused on delivering high-quality software for global teams.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To design and build reliable, scalable software that creates measurable value for businesses and users across global markets — from MVP to production at scale.

passion.title: Passion
passion.text: I'm passionate about crafting elegant user experiences backed by robust engineering. I enjoy turning complex requirements into intuitive products with clean, maintainable code.

experience.title: Background
experience.text: I work across the full stack, partnering with teams in Canada, France, Germany, the UK and the US. My experience spans e-commerce marketplaces, fintech applications and custom web platforms.

values.title: Core Values
items: Quality over quantity — every detail matters in production software
Clear communication across cultures, languages and time zones
Continuous learning with pragmatic, results-driven innovation
User-centered design paired with engineering excellence

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I use to design, build and deploy modern, production-ready applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Products and platforms I've designed and built — from architecture to deployment.

yorix.title: Yorix Marketplace
yorix.description: A multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace connecting buyers and sellers with secure payments, real-time inventory and a streamlined shopping experience.
features: Secure checkout with Stripe payment integration
Advanced product search, filters and categories
Order tracking and automated email notifications

hodix.title: Hodix Fintech
hodix.description: A financial technology platform for personal finance management — featuring transaction tracking, budget analytics and secure account integrations.
features: Interactive budget dashboards and spending insights
Secure bank account linking via financial APIs
Role-based access with encrypted data handling

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio
portfolio.description: A production-ready developer portfolio showcasing projects and skills — optimized for performance, accessibility and international recruiters.
features: Bilingual support with English and French (EN/FR)
SEO optimized with Open Graph and structured metadata
Smooth animations and fully responsive layout

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Professional journey across full stack development and product delivery.

role1.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
role1.description: Lead development of web applications and e-commerce platforms for global clients. Own features end-to-end from technical design and implementation to deployment and monitoring.

role2.title: Software Developer
role2.description: Built responsive frontend interfaces and RESTful backend APIs. Collaborated with designers and product managers to deliver milestones on schedule in agile sprints.

role3.title: Junior Web Developer
role3.description: Contributed to client web projects, implemented UI components and integrated third-party services. Developed strong foundations in code quality, testing and version control.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Open to opportunities across Canada, France, Germany, the UK and the US. I'd love to hear about your project or role.
